description: Create a content slide on AI diffusion widening productivity gaps, with a two-column layout featuring a horizontal bar chart of US firm AI adoption by industry on the left, a line chart of revenue growth for AI implementers vs laggards on the right, and a commentary sidebar.

header.kicker: 5. Growing AI diffusion widens productivity gaps between regions and firms
header.headline: Early AI adopters are driving productivity and margin growth divergence at regional, firm and sectoral levels while slow adopters face cost pressure and eroding competitiveness

left.title: Change in share of US firms adopting AI, by industry

right.title: Financial value gap between firms implementing AI

items.text: AI adoption is rising unevenly across industries, with information, professional services, and finance leading adoption gains.
Early implementers are opening a sizable revenue growth gap versus firms that have not deployed AI.
As diffusion accelerates, laggards face mounting cost pressure and weakening competitiveness.
